name: MHD Power Distribution Box Board Schematic

bill_of_materials.name: Schottky Barrier Rectifier Diodes
bill_of_materials.purpose: Prevents reverse current from bleeding back into the graphite electrodes when water flow slows

bill_of_materials.name: Electrolytic Smoothing Capacitors
bill_of_materials.purpose: Filters out high-frequency voltage ripples caused by hydraulic turbulence crossing the magnet rings

bill_of_materials.name: Transient Voltage Suppression Diode
bill_of_materials.purpose: Absorbs explosive voltage surges if a high-energy atmospheric static charge strikes the vortex

bill_of_materials.name: Buck-Boost DC-DC Regulator Node
bill_of_materials.specification: Step-Down/Step-Up Converter Module (Input: 4V-40V, Output: Adjustable to 14.4V)
bill_of_materials.purpose: Stabilizes variable input voltage to a constant bulk-charge profile for the battery bank
